frontier-lab.label: Proprietary frontier labs
frontier-lab.what: Build closed flagship models and ship first-party tool-using agent SDKs/products

frontier-lab.label: Hyperscaler AI labs
frontier-lab.what: Big-Tech labs bundling in-house frontier models into cloud + enterprise agent platforms

frontier-lab.label: Open-weight model labs
frontier-lab.what: Release open-weight frontier models and agent frameworks others build agents on

frontier-lab.label: Enterprise/applied labs
frontier-lab.what: Enterprise-tuned models with agentic orchestration/RAG for business task execution

agent-native-startup.label: Customer Support Agents
agent-native-startup.what: Agents that resolve customer support and service end-to-end.

agent-native-startup.label: Voice Agent Platforms
agent-native-startup.what: Platforms for building and running production voice/phone agents.

agent-native-startup.label: Sales & Back-Office Workers
agent-native-startup.what: AI digital workers for sales/GTM, RevOps and back-office ops.

agent-native-startup.label: Vertical Domain Agents
agent-native-startup.what: Domain agents for legal, finance, compliance and enterprise knowledge.

agent-native-startup.label: General & Computer-Use
agent-native-startup.what: General-purpose autonomous agents that operate the web and computer.

agent-native-startup.label: Agent Platforms & Frameworks
agent-native-startup.what: Horizontal frameworks/platforms to build and orchestrate agents.

bank-fintech.label: Agent payment & data rails
bank-fintech.what: Payment networks, processors and data APIs enabling AI agents to transact and move money.

bank-fintech.label: Incumbent banks
bank-fintech.what: Large traditional and Wall-Street banks deploying internal and customer-facing agents.

bank-fintech.label: Neobanks & digital banks
bank-fintech.what: Digital-first banks running in-app assistant and financial-crime agents at scale.

bank-fintech.label: Spend & finance-ops agents
bank-fintech.what: B2B/SMB software automating expense, AP, accounting and tax with autonomous agents.

bank-fintech.label: Consumer & SMB fintech apps
bank-fintech.what: Consumer and SMB payments/commerce apps deploying support and operations agents.

healthcare.label: Ambient Scribes & Docs
healthcare.what: Ambient AI that captures clinician-patient visits and auto-drafts clinical notes/orders in the EHR.

healthcare.label: Revenue Cycle & Prior Auth
healthcare.what: Agents automating coding, billing/revenue cycle, prior authorization, intake/scheduling, and payer interactions.

healthcare.label: Clinical Decision Support
healthcare.what: Physician-facing agents that surface diagnoses, evidence, and chart insights to aid clinical reasoning.

healthcare.label: Patient Virtual Care
healthcare.what: Patient-facing voice/chat agents for triage, virtual nursing, scheduling, and care navigation.

healthcare.label: Care Ops & AI Staff
healthcare.what: Operational 'teammate' and full-stack AI-employee agents running hospital/clinic capacity, flow, and staff roles.

security-eval-vendor.label: Agent red-teaming
security-eval-vendor.what: Independent adversarial attack-simulation testing of LLMs and agents

security-eval-vendor.label: Guardrails & AI firewall
security-eval-vendor.what: Real-time runtime defense blocking prompt injection and data leaks

security-eval-vendor.label: AI security platform
security-eval-vendor.what: Broad AI/agent security: discovery, posture, governance, access control

security-eval-vendor.label: Agent eval & reliability
security-eval-vendor.what: Automated evaluation/testing of agent quality, hallucination, tool-use

security-eval-vendor.label: Frontier safety evals
security-eval-vendor.what: Nonprofit/lab evals of dangerous agentic capabilities and deception

security-eval-vendor.label: Assurance & monitoring
security-eval-vendor.what: Third-party assurance/insurance and production agent observability

investor-vc.label: Cybersecurity VCs
investor-vc.what: Security-specialist funds whose mandate is backing AI-security and red-teaming startups.

investor-vc.label: Generalist + AI-sec thesis
investor-vc.what: Multistage platform VCs with an explicit AI/agent-security investing thesis and portfolio.

investor-vc.label: Generalist agent VCs
investor-vc.what: Multistage platform VCs backing agent and frontier-AI companies, with no security thesis.

investor-vc.label: Accelerators & pre-seed
investor-vc.what: Formation-stage funds and accelerators writing first checks (plus compute) into agent startups.

infra-platform.label: Frameworks & orchestration
infra-platform.what: SDKs and frameworks to build, orchestrate, memory-enable and observe agents

infra-platform.label: Inference & model serving
infra-platform.what: Clouds and hardware that serve, scale and run the models behind agents

infra-platform.label: Runtime & sandboxes
infra-platform.what: Sandboxes, browsers, durable execution and real-time media where agent actions run

infra-platform.label: Tools & integrations
infra-platform.what: Connectivity layer giving agents authenticated access to external apps and APIs

enterprise-other.label: Agent Platforms & Clouds
enterprise-other.what: Horizontal clouds/platforms to build, deploy & orchestrate custom enterprise agents

enterprise-other.label: CRM & Customer Experience
enterprise-other.what: Customer-facing sales, marketing, service & support agent suites

enterprise-other.label: ERP & Systems of Record
enterprise-other.what: Back-office HR, finance, IT & procurement workflow agents

enterprise-other.label: Commerce
enterprise-other.what: E-commerce / merchant-operations agents that run and transact across stores
